profile.evidence: Toh aap ek kaam kariye sir, aapka ek baar na, bilkul aap apna available time bata do, main call back kar lunga sir.
profile.summary: Agent pitched HDFC Life guaranteed income plan, completed discovery (age 48, business, 50k/month income), and offered a callback; customer's final state was non-committal but the agent'            thought: 102.0 seconds. 2 speakers. Agent (HDFC Life) vs Customer. 102s is 1-2 min range. 2-5 min range is 2-5 min. This is 102s, so it's on the border. Let's look at content. Agent pitches HDFC Life guaranteed income plan. Customer provides age (48), occupation (business/kaam), and income (50,000 per month). Agent asks for business type, customer gets defensive/confused. Agent offers callback. Customer says

compliance.return_claim_quote: first year se guaranteed 36 percent ki income dena start karti hai sir, aapki whole life ke liye.
